opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Action Plumbing has no online booking, no contact form, and is phone-only.
opportunities.observation: After-hours plumbing emergencies in Boise go to competitors with instant booking.
opportunities.fix: Deploy an AI booking widget capturing emergency and scheduled jobs 24/7.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 178 Google reviews at 4.7 stars with no detected owner response pattern.
opportunities.observation: Skipping responses on 178 reviews signals low engagement and risks reputation drift.
opportunities.fix: Automate personalized AI responses to every new review within minutes of posting.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; phone-only contact is the sole inbound channel.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call from a Boise homeowner is lost with zero record.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call recording and CRM capture to log every caller and trigger follow-up.
